description: image_read response for a FamilySearch document-image ARK (3:1:3QS7-99QG-KBTG) surfaced on a marriage record's imageArk field. The `ark` predicate uses a case-insensitive substring match on the distinctive ARK id, so it matches whether the agent passes the bare 3:1: ARK or the canonical ark:/61903/3:1:... form (both are accepted by image_read since PR #600). Returns image_read's standard shape (imageData + metadata). NOTE: the harness mock serves this as JSON text, not a rendered image, so this fixture exercises tool-routing (was the ARK passed to the ark parameter?), not visual transcription.
